title: Burger Pack
description: Turns All Of The Salmon Items Into Burgers Bcuz I Love `Em.
body:
This is a pretty simple resource pack. You like burgers, this is THE resource pack for your Minecraft bigback! Love them textures? Well now you can do that with GOD156's very own Burger resource pack!

Also the discord is not dedicated to this resource pack. It is used for other things too. Please ping the owner and clearly state you're there for the resource pack. Report bugs and make suggestions in the discord. 😉
